narrative:
Precinct Maumee 7 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,090 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
